name: consensus-mist
description: AI hidden-role board game prototype based on consensus voting.

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:admin
scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),vm=require('vm'); for (const f of ['server/index.js','server/app.js','server/routes/gameRoutes.js','server/routes/adminRoutes.js','server/utils/sse.js','server/db.js','server/adminStore.js','server/mistTemplate.js','server/mockGame.js','server/aiConfig.js','server/aiGameRunner.js','server/openaiChat.js','server/gameLogStore.js','server/gameSocket.js']) { new vm.Script(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'), {filename:f}); console.log(f+': ok'); }"
